changeSet.author: openelis-bioanalytical

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Bioanalytical Sample Receiver'

changeSet.comment: Add Bioanalytical Sample Receiver role for bioanalytical sample reception (Stage 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Receives and registers biological samples for bioanalytical testing

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Lab Unit Roles')

changeSet.author: openelis-bioanalytical

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Bioanalytical Chemical Analyst'

changeSet.comment: Add Bioanalytical Chemical Analyst role for bioanalytical testing and analysis

column.name: description
column.value: Performs chemical analysis, method validation, and data interpretation

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Lab Unit Roles')

changeSet.author: openelis-bioanalytical

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Bioanalytical Pharmacist'

changeSet.comment: Add Bioanalytical Pharmacist role for bioanalytical pharmaceutical validation

column.name: description
column.value: Validates pharmaceutical quality and bioequivalence studies

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Lab Unit Roles')

changeSet.author: openelis-bioanalytical

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Bioanalytical Researcher'

changeSet.comment: Add Bioanalytical Researcher role for bioanalytical research and method development

column.name: description
column.value: Conducts bioanalytical research and method development

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Lab Unit Roles')

changeSet.author: openelis-bioanalytical

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Bioanalytical Lab Supervisor'

changeSet.comment: Add Bioanalytical Lab Supervisor role for bioanalytical laboratory supervision

column.name: description
column.value: Supervises laboratory operations and approves sample processing

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Lab Unit Roles')

changeSet.author: openelis-bioanalytical

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Bioanalytical Study Director'

changeSet.comment: Add Bioanalytical Study Director role for bioanalytical study management

column.name: description
column.value: Manages bioequivalence studies and approves study protocols

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Lab Unit Roles')

changeSet.author: openelis-bioanalytical

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Bioanalytical QA Officer'

changeSet.comment: Add Bioanalytical QA Officer role for bioanalytical quality assurance

column.name: description
column.value: Ensures quality assurance and regulatory compliance

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Lab Unit Roles')

changeSet.author: openelis-bioanalytical

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Bioanalytical Data Manager'

changeSet.comment: Add Bioanalytical Data Manager role for bioanalytical data management and reporting

column.name: description
column.value: Manages analytical data and generates reports

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Lab Unit Roles')
